Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

What is a Wiki?

Tech · asked by user [] · 2007-06-16 · 4 answers
What is a Wiki and what are the applications?
user [2] · 2007-06-16
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-dnL00TdmLY
user [3] · 2007-06-28
how can we use that tech in devotional service? practical uses of it
user [2] · 2007-06-29
For example, for a translation work team, you create a web based free wiki and all editors work at their own pace, without having to resolve to emails to update content.
List of the many web based free and paid wiki hosts:
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Comparison_of_wiki_farms
user [543] · 2010-04-19
wikipedia is a free online encyclopedia probably the largest in the world :)
http://www.en.wikipedia.com
